title: CLARKSON PLATOU HELLAS S&P WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSON PLATOU HELLAS S&P WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSON PLATOU HELLAS S&P WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
in Weekly Shipbuilding Reports 16/07/2021
In the tanker market, it was reported that an unknown owner ordered two firm 50k dwt MR tankers at STX, with both vessels to be delivered in 4Q
Source: Clarkson Platou (Hellas) ltd
